message:
🌱 vault: SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys (#1111)

* 🌱 Add vault: SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct difficulty rating to intermediate for SSH CA ed25519 mission

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-11035-ssh-ca-generate-signing-key-to-support-ed25519-keys",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys",
+    "description": "SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys. Requested by 21+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nVault's SSH CA is able to sign certificates using elliptic curve ciphers like ed25519, but cannot generate the private key.  If you set `generate_signing_key` to `true` (which is the default), you always get an RSA key."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys",
+        "description": "Curious about general sentiment here; if it is positive, I'll add docs and a changelog and we can decide what to do about the UI (leave it as-is or drop it for future work).\n\nSee https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/issues/11035 for context. We derive types from the `x/crypto/ssh` types (which match\n```yaml\nalgorithmSigner = algorithmSignerRaw.(string)\n                        switch algorithmSigner {\n                        case ssh.SigAlgoRSA, ssh.SigAlgoRSASHA2256, ssh.SigAlgoRSASHA2512:\n                        case \"\":\n                                // This case is valid, and the sign operation will use the signer's\n                                // default algorithm.\n                        default:\n                                return nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unknown algorithm signer %q\", algorithmSigner)\n                        }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"SSH CA: generate_signing_key to support ed25519 keys\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Curious about general sentiment here; if it is positive, I'll add docs and a changelog and we can decide what to do about the UI (leave it as-is or drop it for future work).\n\nSee https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/issues/11035 for context. We derive types from the `x/crypto/ssh` types (which match OpenSSH's constants), thus making key bits only relevant for RSA keys.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "algorithmSigner = algorithmSignerRaw.(string)\n                        switch algorithmSigner {\n                        case ssh.SigAlgoRSA, ssh.SigAlgoRSASHA2256, ssh.SigAlgoRSASHA2512:\n                        case \"\":\n                                // This case is valid, and the sign operation will use the signer's\n                                // default algorithm.\n                        default:\n                                return nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unknown algorithm signer %q\", algorithmSigner)\n                        }",
+        "\"algorithm_signer\": \"rsa-sha2-256\","
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vault",
+      "community",
+      "secrets",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vault"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/pull/14008"
+    },
+    "reactions": 21,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+      "vault"
+    ],
